channel.title: Backgrounds on Mohammad Movahedi

item.title: Background
item.description:
Educational Background

Florida State University

Ph.D., Civil Engineering
Jan 2022 – Present

Dissertation Title:
“A Holistic Approach to Long-term Building Maintenance Planning under Uncertainty to Maximize Recoverable Material Yields”

Florida State University

M.Eng., Civil Engineering
Jan 2022 – Jan 2024

Iran University of Science and Technology

M.Sc., Transportation and Highway Engineering
Sep 2017 – Sep 2020
